problem_statement:
bug: doctoc does not respect "id" attribute of headers when constructing the TOC When I try to generate TOC for a file that starts like such: ```md # Test 1

Test á ``` I'd expect doctoc to generate a second TOC entry that respects the explicit "id": ```md - [Test 1](#test-1) - [Test á](#test-a) # Test 1

Teste á

``` Instead, I get an autogenerated slug regardless: ```md - [Test 1](#test-1) - [Test á](#test-%C3%A1) # Test 1

Teste á

``` Is that correct? If not, how difficult would it be for a fix to be made? I can help, if someone points me to the right places.
hints_text:
Seems like a reasonable assumption to make, and sounds like it could be an improvement!

The codebase is pretty small, I think [here](https://github.com/thlorenz/doctoc/blob/master/lib/get-html-headers.js) would be a decent place to begin your investigation.
